schemes.scheme_name: SBI Education Loan for Higher Education
schemes.description: Affordable education loans for pursuing higher education in India and abroad
schemes.target_audience: Students pursuing graduation, post-graduation, professional courses
schemes.repayment_tenure: 3 months to 15 years (1 year moratorium after course completion)
schemes.collateral_required: No collateral for loans up to ₹7.5 lakh; Collateral or third-party guarantee for higher amounts
key_features: Covers full education cost including tuition, hostel, books
required_documents: Income proof - last 2 years IT returns or salary slips
pros: No collateral for loans up to ₹7.5 lakh
Can be used for education abroad
cons: Requires guarantor for higher loan amounts
Additional charges if repayment is late

schemes.scheme_name: SBI Home Loan - Priority Lending Scheme
schemes.description: Competitive home loans for purchasing, constructing or renovating residential properties
key_features: Flexible loan amount up to 80-90% of property value
Balance transfer facility from other banks
Top-up loans on existing SBI home loans
Option to convert floating to fixed rate
Free home loan insurance for up to 1 year
eligibility_criteria: Age + loan tenure should not exceed 75 years
pros: Low interest rates with floating options
Tax benefits on interest and principal repayment
Top-up facility at competit ive rates
cons: Early repayment charges (2-3%) in first few years

schemes.description: Quick personal loans for any purpose without collateral
key_features: Can be used for any purpose
required_documents: Last 2 years IT returns or salary slips
pros: Can be used for any purpose
Low processing fees for prime customers
cons: Higher interest rates compared to secured loans
EMI is fixed for floating rate loans

schemes.description: Working capital loans for MSMEs and small businesses for trade and business operations
schemes.target_audience: Micro, Small & Medium Enterprises (MSMEs), traders, manufacturers
schemes.collateral_required: Collateral security as per bank norms; Can be availed without collateral under 50L scheme
key_features: Working capital facility for operational needs
Flexible repayment based on business cycle
Option to renew at lower rates
eligibility_criteria: Business in operation for minimum 2 years
pros: Government subsidy available for eligible businesses
Competitive rates for good credit history

schemes.description: Agriculture loans for farmers to purchase equipment, seeds, fertilizers, and land development
schemes.collateral_required: No collateral for loans up to ₹1 lakh; Collateral for higher amounts
key_features: Flexible repayment based on crop season
Can be used for farm mechanization or organic farming
Debt waiver possibility for eligible farmers
required_documents: Land ownership documents or tenancy agreement
eligibility_criteria: Owner of agricultural land or tenant farmer
Land must be free from encumbrances (in most cases)
pros: Flexible repayment aligned with harvest season

schemes.description: Government-backed scheme to promote entrepreneurship through collateral-free business loans
schemes.target_audience: First-time entrepreneurs, self-employed individuals, small business owners
key_features: Flexible repayment based on cash flow
eligibility_criteria: Business should not have borrowed more than ₹10 lakh previously
No age restriction for existing businesses
pros: Available for women entrepreneurs at lower rates
cons: Limited to small business amounts (up to ₹10 lakh)
Higher interest rates than some secured loans

schemes.description: Safe investment option offering fixed interest rates on deposits for various tenures
schemes.target_audience: All individuals and senior citizens seeking safe investment returns
key_features: Additional benefits for senior citizens (0.50% extra)
Partial or full premature withdrawal allowed
Tax benefits under Section 80C (for specific schemes)
eligibility_criteria: Senior citizens (60+ years) get additional rate benefit
cons: Tax on interest income (TDS at 10% for non-senior citizens)

schemes.description: Basic savings account for everyday banking with interest on balance
key_features: Minimum balance requirement varies by city
Interest accrued on average daily balance
eligibility_criteria: Should have valid identity and address proof
pros: Easy to open with minimal documentation
cons: Charges for ATM withdrawals beyond free limit

schemes.description: Flexible home loans with options to adjust EMI based on income changes
schemes.collateral_required: First mortgage of property being financed

schemes.description: Quick personal loans for any purpose with flexible repayment options
Education loans to support higher studies in India and abroad with minimal documentation
schemes.collateral_required: No collateral up to ₹7.5 lakh; Collateral for higher amounts
key_features: Moratorium up to 1 year after course
pros: No collateral for loans up to ₹7.5 lakh

schemes.description: Dedicated loan program for MSMEs with simple documentation and quick processing
schemes.collateral_required: Collateral as per bank norms; Unsecured options available up to ₹25 lakhs

schemes.description: Unsecured personal loans for salaried individuals and self-employed professionals
Agricultural loans for crop production and farm inputs
schemes.collateral_required: No collateral for loans up to ₹1 lakh
key_features: Flexible repayment linked to crop cycle

schemes.description: Home loans for property purchase, construction and renovation
Instant personal loans with quick approval and disbursal
Government-backed long-term savings account with sovereign safety, annual compounding, and EEE tax benefits.
schemes.repayment_tenure: 15 years, extendable in blocks of 5 years
key_features: EEE tax status under prevailing tax rules
Sovereign guarantee by Government of India
Minimum annual contribution ₹500 and maximum ₹1.5 lakh
Partial withdrawal allowed after 5 years as per rules
eligibility_criteria: NRIs and HUFs are not eligible
pros: Useful for retirement and long-horizon goals
cons: Premature closure allowed only under specific conditions

schemes.description: Government-backed floating-rate bonds for conservative investors seeking periodic interest.
Retirement-oriented market-linked scheme with tax benefits under prevailing rules.
schemes.target_audience: Working professionals and self-employed planning retirement
schemes.repayment_tenure: Until retirement / exit as per NPS norms

schemes.description: Government pension scheme designed to provide guaranteed pension post-retirement.
schemes.target_audience: Workers in unorganized and organized sectors

schemes.description: Safe small-savings certificate scheme designed for capital doubling over defined tenure.
Girl child focused long-term savings scheme with tax benefits and attractive rates.
eligibility_criteria: Within age criteria as per SSY rules

schemes.description: Special deposit account to park capital gains and claim tax benefits under applicable laws.
schemes.repayment_tenure: As per tax timelines and scheme rules

schemes.description: Digital route to buy 24K gold without storing physical gold.
RBI-issued gold-linked bond with fixed annual interest over gold price movement.
schemes.repayment_tenure: 8 years (early exit options as per rules)
eligibility_criteria: Resident individual / HUF / trusts as per RBI norms
pros: Tax-efficient on maturity as per rules

schemes.description: Integrated demat and trading account for equity and related market investments.
Platform access to Axis mutual fund investing across equity, debt, hybrid and thematic options.
schemes.target_audience: SIP and lump-sum mutual fund investors

schemes.scheme_name: Axis Small Cap Fund Direct Growth
schemes.description: Equity small-cap focused mutual fund option from Axis AMC.
schemes.processing_fee: Expense ratio as per fund factsheet

schemes.scheme_name: Axis Midcap Fund Direct Plan Growth
schemes.description: Mid-cap equity mutual fund aiming long-term capital appreciation.

schemes.scheme_name: Axis Large Cap Fund Direct Growth
schemes.description: Large-cap equity fund focused on relatively stable market leaders.
pros: Relatively lower volatility than small caps

schemes.scheme_name: Axis ELSS Tax Saver Direct Plan Growth
schemes.description: Equity-linked tax saving mutual fund under Section 80C (as per prevailing tax rules).
Debt-oriented liquid fund for short-term parking and liquidity needs.
Multi-cap equity fund allocating across large, mid and small-cap segments.

schemes.scheme_name: Axis Large & Mid Cap Fund Direct Growth
schemes.description: Blend of large and mid-cap stocks for balanced growth exposure.
key_features: Dual exposure to large and mid-cap

schemes.scheme_name: Axis Nifty Smallcap 50 Index Fund Direct Growth
schemes.description: Passive index fund tracking Nifty Smallcap 50 universe.
pros: Cost-efficient compared to many active funds

schemes.scheme_name: Axis Nifty500 Value 50 Index Fund Direct Growth
schemes.description: Passive value-style index fund tracking Nifty500 Value 50.

schemes.scheme_name: Axis Global Innovation FoF Direct Growth
schemes.description: Global thematic fund-of-fund focused on innovation-led businesses.

schemes.scheme_name: Axis Greater China Equity FoF Direct Growth
schemes.description: International fund-of-fund offering Greater China equity market exposure.

Business loans for small and medium enterprises with flexible terms
schemes.collateral_required: Collateral as per norms; Unsecured up to ₹50 lakhs for eligible MSMEs

schemes.description: Seasonal and term loans for agricultural activities
schemes.collateral_required: No collateral for loans up to ₹1 lakh

schemes.description: Small savings scheme for long-term financial security of a girl child
schemes.target_audience: Parents/guardians of a girl child below 10 years
schemes.repayment_tenure: Deposit for 15 years, maturity at 21 years
key_features: Account can be opened at authorized banks and post offices
Tax benefits as per prevailing rules
Partial withdrawal allowed after a specified age
Long-term savings discipline for girl child
required_documents: Identity and address proof of parent/guardian
eligibility_criteria: Girl child below 10 years at time of account opening
One account per girl child (up to two girls per family)

schemes.description: Government savings scheme to support the education and well-being of girl children
schemes.target_audience: Girl child from economically weaker sections
key_features: One-time grant at birth and annual scholarships for schooling
Focus on retention of girl child in school
eligibility_criteria: Girl child belonging to BPL/EWS families
pros: Direct support for girl child education

schemes.description: Scholarship support for single girl child students in CBSE-affiliated schools
schemes.target_audience: Single girl child students in Classes XI-XII
schemes.minimum_income_required: Family income as per CBSE norms
key_features: Scholarship for single girl child to promote education
eligibility_criteria: Single girl child studying in Class XI or XII

schemes.description: A government-backed retirement savings scheme where both employee and employer contribute monthly.
schemes.target_audience: Salaried employees seeking long-term retirement savings
key_features: Monthly contribution by employee and employer
pros: Employer adds to your monthly contribution

schemes.description: A savings account with features like debit cards, internet banking, and mobile banking.

key_features: Covers tuition fees, living expenses, and other related costs

schemes.scheme_name: HDFC Golden Years Senior Citizens Account
schemes.description: Premium banking for senior citizens with wealth management and healthcare benefits, featuring higher FD rates, free health checkup packages, priority customer service, and relationship manager support.

Specially designed account for women with lifestyle benefits and preferential pricing, including free personal accident insurance, special debit card with benefits, lower home loan rates, and free locker facility.

Savings account for children with parental controls and financial education. Features no minimum balance, free debit card for teens, parental oversight features, financial literacy tools, and goal-based savings features.

Feature-rich salary account for professionals with zero balance and exclusive benefits, including free platinum debit card, pre-approved loans, airport lounge access, and investment advisory services.

Digital-first account for young adults (18-28 years) with lifestyle rewards and investment options. Features cashback on transactions, instant personal loan facility, free forex card for travel, investment guidance, and digital wallet integration.

Flexible savings account with tiered benefits based on balance maintained, multicurrency debit card, and integrated investment platform
